title: aipack Pack Manifest
description: Schema for aipack pack.json manifest files (schema_version 1). See docs/pack-format.md for the full specification.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor validation.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. This schema defines version 1.

name.description: Pack identifier. Must match the pack's directory name. Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens or underscores.

version.description: Informational pack version. Convention: YYYY.MM.DD or semver. The authoritative version is the git ref used at install time.

description.description: Human-readable description of the pack's purpose. Used by search indexing and registry listings.

root.description: Base path for content resolution, relative to pack.json. Typically ".".

rules.description: Explicit rule content IDs to include. Omit entirely to auto-discover from rules/*.md. An empty array [] means the pack explicitly declares no rules.

agents.description: Explicit agent content IDs to include. Omit entirely to auto-discover from agents/*.md. An empty array [] means the pack explicitly declares no agents.

workflows.description: Explicit workflow content IDs to include. Omit entirely to auto-discover from workflows/*.md. An empty array [] means the pack explicitly declares no workflows.

skills.description: Explicit skill content IDs to include. Omit entirely to auto-discover from skills/*/SKILL.md. An empty array [] means the pack explicitly declares no skills.

prompts.description: Local prompt library IDs (prompts/<id>.md). Not synced to harnesses — used for pack-internal prompt management and promptlib publishing only.

mcp.description: MCP server default configurations. Keys must match corresponding mcp/<name>.json files.

profiles.description: Relative paths to bundled profile YAML files. Copied to the user's profile directory on install with --seed.

registries.description: Relative paths to bundled registry YAML files. Merged into the user's local registry on install with --seed.

content_id.description: Content identifier. Derived from filename without extension (rules/my-rule.md → my-rule) or subdirectory name (skills/my-skill/ → my-skill). Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens or underscores.

relative_path.description: Relative file path within the pack directory. Must not contain '..' path traversal.

propertyNames.description: Server name. Must match the name field in the corresponding mcp/<name>.json file (case-insensitive).

servers.description: Per-server default configurations keyed by server name.

default_allowed_tools.description: Tool names auto-approved by default. Profiles can override this list per-server. Tools not in this list but in the server's available_tools inventory follow harness-specific default behavior (typically ask/prompt).

harness_settings.description: Base harness config template files per harness. Merged with engine-managed keys (MCP servers, tool permissions, content references) at sync time. At most one pack per profile can provide settings for a given harness.

harness_plugins.description: Harness plugin config files per harness. Synced as pure copies — not merged, not gated by --skip-settings.

harness_name.description: Harness identifier. Known values: claudecode, opencode, codex, cline.
